locations.name: 呂宋
locations.summary: 呂宋（他加祿語：Luzon；白話字：Lū-sòng）是菲律賓最大的島，也是世界第15大島，面積109,965平方公里。呂宋島位於菲律賓北部，是首都馬尼拉的所在地。呂宋島在台灣南方，米沙鄢群島北方，南海東方，菲律宾海西方。《劍橋百科》介紹：…

locations.name: 菲律宾
locations.summary: 菲律賓共和國（他加祿語：Republika ng Pilipinas；英語：Republic of the Philippines）簡稱菲律賓，是東南亞的群島國家。位於西太平洋，北隔呂宋海峽與臺灣相望，南隔西里伯斯海與印度尼西亚相望，西隔…

locations.name: 原始森林
locations.summary: 原始森林又稱原生林，是指一个森林已经达到非常非常长久的年龄而没有遭到显著的干扰，成功表现出独特的生态特征，并可能被归类为顶极群落。原生特性包括多样化的树有关的结构，提供多样化的野生动物栖息地，增加了森林生态系统的生物多样性。多样化的树结构…

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Sierra Madre ground warbler
relations.evidence: It is endemic to the island of Luzon in the Philippines, where it is found in the northeastern and eastern foothills of the Sierra Madre

relations.subject: Sierra Madre ground warbler
relations.evidence: It is found in lowland moist and low montane dipterocarp forest in primary forest, secondary forest and forest edge up to 1,300 m

relations.subject: Sierra Madre ground warbler
relations.evidence: It is found in two protected areas in the Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park and the Aurora Memorial National Park; however, like most areas in the Philippines protection is lax

relations.subject: Sierra Madre ground warbler
relations.evidence: Its habitat is in tropical moist lowland and the lower reaches of tropical montane forest
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Sierra Madre ground warbler
relations.evidence: It was formerly conspecific and forms a species complex with the Cordillera ground warbler and Bicol ground warbler, which are some of most elusive birds in the country due to their extremely shy nature.While not officially threatened, its population is said to be declining due to habitat destruction through deforestation
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
